creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
After updating devel/gcc44 to the following version, build fails a
little further.  This seems to confirm it is a gcc-related problem.

gcc44 (GCC) 4.4.5 20100608 (prerelease)

-- 
Romain Tartière <romain@FreeBSD.org>  http://people.FreeBSD.org/~romain/
